name: Milo & Olive
teaser: A clone of a great pizza is never bad. Don't skip the garlic knot.
review: A churlish description would be "Westside Mozza clone," but over the years I think it has come into its own. A clone of a great pizza is never bad. Don't skip the garlic knot.
headsUp: Natural fermentation means the dough is the star. Don't over-top it.
update: One of the more interesting slice shops to open in LA recently.
